title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾风格为特色。

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code

title: AI slop is killing online communities
content: Article URL: https://rmoff.net/2026/05/06/ai-slop-is-killing-online-communities/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48053203 Points: 493 # Comments: 467
summary: 文章探讨AI生成的低质量内容（AI slop）如何破坏在线社区，导致信息质量下降、用户信任流失和社区互动恶化。
highlights: AI slop is killing online communities
low-quality AI-generated content undermines trust and engagement
communities struggle to maintain quality as AI slop proliferates

title: Mojo v1.0.0b1
summary: Mojo 发布了 v1.0.0b1 版本，提供了下载链接和社区讨论入口。
